hero.headline: With the right partner, your energy investment is
hero.subtext: We deliver engineering, EPC, operations and digital energy management in one integrated platform.

feasibility.title: We turn your data into analysis and reveal savings opportunities.
feasibility.description: Based on your roof area and current consumption, we provide free producible energy calculation, OPCOM-based savings analysis, and investment return analysis.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.subtitle: End-to-end energy solutions for industrial and commercial facilities.

rooftop.title: Rooftop PV Solutions
rooftop.desc: We design, install and operate high-efficiency rooftop PV systems for industrial and commercial facilities.

carport.title: Carport & EV Charging Solutions
carport.desc: We offer future-ready mobility solutions with solar-integrated carport systems and smart charging infrastructure.

bess.title: BESS Energy Storage Solutions
bess.desc: We store your energy, enable flexible usage and reduce your grid dependency.

about.title: Field experience. Engineering trust.
about.desc: BY SUN SOLAR ENERGY PLATFORM is an energy transformation partner operating with field-based EPC experience, operational know-how and an own-energy-production investment perspective.
about.desc2: Thanks to our founders' energy generation plant experience, we develop projects that understand risks, return periods and real field requirements from an investor's perspective.

energyos.title: BY SUN EnergyOS
energyos.subtitle: Smart Energy Management Platform
energyos.desc: A digital energy management layer that makes production, consumption, maintenance, performance, ESG and savings data visible in one center.
energyos.dashboardDesc: View all your energy data in one platform.
energyos.reportDesc: Real-time performance metrics and efficiency analysis
energyos.alarmDesc: Failure notifications, maintenance tracking and incident management
energyos.roiDesc: Investment return analysis and savings reports
energyos.ctaDesc: Contact us for a platform demo or preview.

esg.title: We transform green energy into measurable value.
esg.message: Produce your energy. Certify it. Report it. Convert it into corporate value.

contact.title: Let's plan your energy transformation together.
contact.desc: Let us prepare a pre-feasibility based on your electricity invoice, roof/parking area, facility location and consumption profile.
contact.info: After form submission, the BY SUN team will contact you for preliminary feasibility.
contact.success: Your request has been received! We will contact you shortly.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.

footer.slogan: Strong Investment • Smart Savings • Energy Independence
